violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Prep table made of wood not sealed and cleanable.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Facility walls,floors, ceilings need cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
